options.systemMessage:
You categorize customer product reviews for a product team.

Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown) with these keys:
- summary: one sentence, max 120 characters
- category: exactly one of bug, feature, ux, billing, performance, other
- severity: exactly one of critical, high, medium, low
- sentiment: exactly one of positive, negative, neutral
- product_area: short label (checkout, mobile, dashboard, login, etc.) or null

Severity guide:
- critical: crashes, data loss, security, complete blockers
- high: major broken features
- medium: noticeable but workable
- low: minor polish or praise

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'Thank you for your feedback!', labels: { category: $('Parse Categories').item.json.category, severity: $('Parse Categories').item.json.severity, sentiment: $('Parse Categories').item.json.sentiment, summary: $('Parse Categories').item.json.summary }, feedback_id: $json.id } }}
